_comment: Held-out variant of mixed_pool.json for the Archaludon self-play VALIDATION probe (2026-06-29). kaggle:archaludon is DELIBERATELY REMOVED so it can serve as a clean, deck-controlled held-out yardstick in --eval-opponents: the Archaludon trainee learns its deck via self/past mirrors + cross-archetype pressure here, then is evaluated vs the hand-coded Archaludon rule agent it NEVER trained against. Beating it >50% = self-play has provably surpassed the matched heuristic (the load-bearing thesis), not overfit to the eval opponent. Do NOT add kaggle:archaludon back to this file.
